title: Maintain food safety and quality programs
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Maintain food safety and quality programs demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Identify food safety and quality systems in workplace

pcs.text: Identify the quality and food safety programs in place in own work area
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify the quality and food safety programs in place in own work area?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify the quality and food safety programs in place in own work area.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify regulatory requirements for food safety and quality relevant to work area.
